releases.label: 2 Ms original catalog (Alexander et al. 2003)
releases.summary: Original point-source catalogs from the full ~2 Ms CDF-N exposure (20 ACIS observations, 1999-2002), then the deepest X-ray observation ever taken: 503 X-ray sources detected over an ~448 arcmin2 area in up to seven X-ray bands, plus a 78-source supplementary catalog; on-axis limits ~2.5e-17 (0.5-2 keV) and ~1.4e-16 (2-8 keV) erg/cm2/s. Superseded by the Xue et al. 2016 reprocessing.

releases.label: 2 Ms CDF-N catalog
releases.summary: Improved 2 Ms CDF-N point-source catalog (Xue et al. 2016): reprocessing of the same data with modern methodology (wavdetect + binomial-probability selection P <= 0.004) yields a main catalog of 683 X-ray sources (196 new vs. Alexander et al. 2003) plus 72 supplementary NIR-bright sources, with improved positions, multiwavelength counterparts, spectroscopic/photometric redshifts, and AGN/galaxy/star classifications (591/75/17 in the main catalog). The current canonical CDF-N catalog over ~448 arcmin2 (HEASARC table CDFN2MSNEW).
